query: 2025 European Junior Swimming Championships Samorin Slovakia: Russia AIN neutral athletes gold medal results day by day. Which events did Russia win gold (5 total) and on which days? Also note 2021 Rome Russia 11 golds. Was Russia's gold haul back-loaded toward later days of the meet?
answer:
I've completed the research with full cross-validation. Here's the summary:

## Key Findings

**The 5 Russia/AIN (Neutral) golds at 2025 Euro Juniors (Šamorín, 1–6 July 2025):**

| Day | Date | Athlete | Event | Time |
|-----|------|---------|-------|------|
| Day 2 | Jul 2 | Georgii Iakovlev | Boys 50m Backstroke | 25.04 |
| Day 3 | Jul 3 | Mikhail Shcherbakov | Boys 200m IM | 1:59.04 (CR) |
| Day 5 | Jul 5 | Sofia Diakova | Girls 800m Freestyle | 8:27.78 |
| Day 6 | Jul 6 | Sofia Diakova | Girls 400m Freestyle | 4:07.06 |
| Day 6 | Jul 6 | Grigorii Vekovishchev | Boys 400m Freestyle | 3:48.71 |

**Was the haul back-loaded? — Yes, distinctly.**
- Distribution: Day 1 = 0, Day 2 = 1, Day 3 = 1, Day 4 = 0, Day 5 = 1, **Day 6 = 2**
- 3 of 5 golds (60%) came on the final two days; the biggest single day was the last day (2 golds, both freestyle, in a storm-interrupted session)
- Sofia Diakova led the team with an 800/400 free double plus a 200 free bronze

**2021 Rome comparison:** Russia (under its own flag) topped the table with **11 gold / 26 total medals**. The 2025 neutral haul of 5 golds is **less than half** the 2021 figure — reflecting both a smaller restricted neutral contingent (no flagged relays) and the years of suspension between editions.

The official European Aquatics results page was blocked (HTTP 403), so I cross-validated every gold against SwimSwam day-by-day recaps, InterSportStats' event-by-event medal list, Wikipedia, the-sports.org, and a Russian regional outlet — all consistent.

sources.snippet: Neutral (NEU) golds: Men 50 Back Georgy Yakovlev; Men 400 Free Grigory Vekovishchev; Men 200 IM Mikhail Shcherbakov; Women 400 Free & 800 Free Sofya Dyakova. Medal table: Neutral 5G/4S/4B.

sources.snippet: GOLD – Georgii Iakovlev (AIN), 25.04 in Boys 50m Backstroke.

sources.title: 2025 European Junior Championships: Day 3 Finals Live Recap

sources.title: 2025 European Junior Championships: Day Six Finals Live Recap
sources.snippet: Final day events; Iakovlev silver in 100 back behind John Shortt.

sources.title: Samorin 2025: GB top medals table after four golds on rain-interrupted final session
sources.snippet: On final day, neutral athletes Sofia Diakova and Grigorii Vekovishchev took gold in the women's and men's 400m freestyle (Diakova 4:07.06; Vekovishchev 3:48.71). Storm halted proceedings ~30 min.

sources.title: Sofia Diakova: 'The weather was a bit sad' (Realnoe Vremya)
sources.snippet: Tatarstan swimmer Sofia Diakova won two golds (400 & 800 free) plus 200 free bronze; 400 free on 6 July in the rain. Russian neutral team finished 2nd in team standings behind England.

sources.title: Swimming — European Junior Championships 2021 — Medals
sources.snippet: 2021 Rome medal table: Russia 11/9/6/26; Turkey 7/5/3/15; Poland 5/3/4/12.

sources.title: Turkey & Poland Make Major Moves To Shake Up Euro Juniors Final Medal Table (2021)
sources.snippet: Russia topped the 2021 medal table for the 9th year in a row with 26 medals (down from 36 in 2019).
